CREATE TABLE [dbo].[metatable]
(
    source_container VARCHAR(50), 
    source_folder VARCHAR(50),
    target_container VARCHAR(50),
    target_folder VARCHAR(50)
)


INSERT INTO [dbo].[metatable]
(source_container, source_folder, target_container, target_folder)
VALUES ('retail-data','sales_orders','bronze','sales_orders');
